title: PTS-Deco
description: This Mod adds over 2000 Decorations models with that you can decorate your world
body:
🌟 PTS-Deco – Your Gateway to Luxury and Modern Design in Minecraft! 🌟

Have you ever dreamed of transforming Minecraft into a paradise of elegance and modern aesthetics?
Welcome to PTS-Deco, the ultimate decoration mod that brings style, sophistication, and creativity into your world!
✨ Key Features

🛋 Luxurious Furniture
Choose from a wide range of sofas, armchairs, tables, and shelves – all crafted with stunning attention to detail. Materials like leather, marble, and glass bring realism and elegance to your builds.

🌴 Outdoor Living
Design breathtaking gardens and patios with infinity pools, fire pits, umbrellas, and lounge chairs – perfect for your modern villa or urban retreat.

🎨 Stylish Decorations
Add character to your interiors with golden statues, glass chandeliers, bonsai trees, carpets, and more. Every item is created to elevate your space.

🏗 Endless Creative Possibilities
With hundreds of custom blocks and items, you can build anything: from a sleek penthouse or futuristic apartment to a cozy designer café.
🌐 Perfect for Multiplayer and Roleplay

Decorate community areas, furnish luxury hotels, or design an entire modern metropolis with your friends.
PTS-Deco is ideal for immersive roleplay servers and collaborative builds.
📥 Download Now and Build the World You've Always Dreamed Of!

From minimalist modernism to extravagant design – make your dream home a reality in Minecraft. 🌆
👥 Credits

    Nik123123555 – Lead Developer & Model Designer
    KatzeJuli123 – Contributing Model Designer

    ✅ You are free to include this mod in your modpack!
